desc: In the ruins, flowers bloomed. Bevelyn saw it—true beauty lies not in flawlessness, but in blooming after breaking.

name: Frosted Stare
desc: Through years of exile, her father's words drove Zahra on: 'Live, Zahra—for the kingdom. They are waiting for you.'

name: Awaiting Dawn
desc: Beneath the moon, Kasim drowned in music and wine, blind to the feast that tolled the bell of his own demise.

name: Bright Waves
desc: But the lake began to dry up. We losed our home. I searched everywhere, but nowhere felt like our new home.'

name: Sweetheart Spark
desc: Would she emerge through smoke, or farewell with a rose? Unique details would give her character brilliance.

name: Gentle Haven
desc: During work pauses, folk would hear her play. The flowing melody, soft as a stream, soothed their weary hearts.

name: Aureate Aria
desc: The roses once brightened her teacher's eyes with love. Now they bloom like a quiet song reflected in her gaze.

name: Scorching Nights
desc: Audrey's childhood was hardship, wandering streets and orphanages, finding no place where she could truly belong.

name: Dimension Chaos
desc: Kuro, Witch of the Night, sighs lightly. Though it's her job, it's really more like volunteer duty!

name: Enchanted Dance
desc: Riche did not hesitate, bringing him home and tending his wounds with herbs and water. Three days later, he awoke.

name: Blushing Glow
desc: Resting her face on her hands, she watches him enchanted by the fish, feeling as if a little fish swam in her heart.

name: Illusory Blaze
desc: He instinctively looks up at the moon and sees faint marks form a wide-open eye at its center.

name: Prayers for Inspiration
desc: O strange, proud, enchanting muse, please never leave me!' With this wish, Gloria opens the studio door.

name: Joyful Old Times
desc: Light and shadow entwine. Celia feels she enters a longed-for dream, or meets a reflection of cherished old days.

name: Abyss of Dream
desc: Her words spread across the land. She will grant the wish of anyone who reaches her. Countless people sail forth.

name: Poem of Sea Mist
desc: The route is perilous, with mist and reefs everywhere. Even master helmsmen may fail, and many turn back.

name: Innocent Song
desc: On the day of parting, evening wind brushes their cheeks. The girls vow to chase their dreams and live as they wish.

name: Joyful Smiles
desc: Ava enters the studio with her puppy. Soft light falls on vintage furniture, with an enchanting scent in the air.

name: Radiant Springtime
desc: Morning sun clears the mist. At the garden gate, Nikki finds Bobo and Momo wearing playful smiles.

name: Silenced Melody
desc: When they first met, the winter snow came early, drifting and swirling, before all autumn leaves had fallen.

name: Clever Insight
desc: Loving fashion, she dreams of making the best clothes. But her tiny-sized body limits her creations to mini garments.

name: Rosy Dreamlight
desc: As she grew, Tessa sensed she wasn't like other kids. The colors she saw never matched what her classmates described.

name: Dream Untainted
desc: Her voice and chiming bells sweep over snowy fields and frosted roofs, carrying hope and blessings into every window.

name: Emerald Filled Gaze
desc: Winter fades into spring again. Cold winds soften, buds appear, and the coming festival becomes everyone's favorite talk.

name: Crisis in the Mist
desc: The official laughs on TV, reflected in her icy gaze. Acting now would alert him; her precise plan is already set.

name: Bright as Sun
desc: In that instant, understanding forms. Morton and Carol pose as lovers, their gazes soft with practiced affection.

name: Cunning Trap
desc: Behind every perfect smile lies a sly prank. Be careful not to fall into the trap of dazzling words.
